name: Anti-slop
note: Catches common AI writing clichés and rewrites the offending paragraph. Each trigger is a separate pattern so individual phrases are easy to add or remove.

actions.note: Store the full list once so {{banned}} is available in the LLM prompt below.
actions.template:
breath catch / catch breath
stone in still water (and similar)
not to... but to...
single tear
burgandy
anchoring
tether
ledger
claiming

actions.prompt:
The paragraph contains the prohibited phrase "{{keyword}}".

Full banned list:
{{banned}}

Task: Rewrite the immediate paragraph smoothly to completely remove "{{keyword}}", while strictly MAINTAINING the current tone of the story.

Requirements:
1. Aim for a minimal structural change to the paragraph.
2. Do not use a simple, lazy word-replacement cliché (e.g., if the keyword is "breath hitch", do not swap it for "breath caught", "gasped", or anything involving respiration). Completely change the physical action or internal reaction to avoid lazy writing tropes entirely.
3. Output ONLY the corrected paragraph text with no introductory remarks.

{{paragraph}}

rules.name: Bad names
rules.note: Replaces overused AI-generated character names with contextually appropriate alternatives.

triggers.keywords: Elara, Elena, Lyra, Lira, Mira, Lily, Seraphina, Sera, Marcus, Voss

actions.template: Elara, Elena, Lyra, Lira, Mira, Lily, Seraphina, Sera, Marcus, Voss

actions.prompt:
Review the following story context up to the restricted name "{{keyword}}":

---
{{history:[10]}} {{up-to}} {{keyword}}
---

Based on the tone, setting, and existing characters in the text above, suggest a single, contextually appropriate replacement name for "{{keyword}}".

Do not reuse common fantasy tropes or names already present in the text. Do not use any names in this list: {{bad_names}}

Output exactly ONE word: the new name itself, with no punctuation, no explanations, and no introductory text.
